hero.title: Secured Loans for Every MSME Need
hero.subtitle: AI-underwritten business loans from ₹5L to ₹50L. Transparent pricing, 2-day disbursal, and terms designed for how MSMEs actually operate.

items.title: MSME Business Term Loan
items.desc: Purpose-built financing for MSMEs — expand operations, purchase inventory, or fund working capital. Flexible EMIs tailored to your cash flow.
items.ideal: Manufacturers, traders, and service businesses looking for growth capital with predictable repayment schedules.

items.title: Loan Against Property
items.desc: Unlock property value to fuel business growth. Higher amounts, longer tenures, and competitive rates in the MSME lending space.
items.ideal: Business owners with residential or commercial property who need larger loan amounts with longer repayment periods.

items.title: Machinery & Equipment Finance
items.desc: Upgrade manufacturing setup without straining working capital. Equipment itself serves as collateral for streamlined processing.
items.ideal: Manufacturing MSMEs looking to upgrade, replace, or add machinery without depleting working capital reserves.

items.title: Working Capital Loan
items.desc: Bridge cash flow gaps, manage seasonal demand, or cover operational expenses for growing MSMEs.
items.ideal: Businesses facing seasonal demand fluctuations or needing to bridge receivable gaps to maintain operations.
